name: mcp-server-heroku
description: Facilitate LLMs interaction with Heroku Platform resources.

rating.reason: The toolset has adequate documentation overall but with significant inconsistencies. Many tools have overly brief, cryptic descriptions (e.g., 'List Heroku apps: owned, collaborator access, team/space filtering') that lack proper context and usage guidance. Parameter descriptions are generally clear but often minimal. Some tools like 'deploy_one_off_dyno' have excellent comprehensive descriptions, while others like basic CRUD operations are underdocumented. The mixed quality and telegraphic style of many descriptions leaves users needing to infer important details about functionality and usage context.
